description: Completion contract binding the string/memory wave-10 fixture, executor support, refreshed coverage truth, structured telemetry, and remote-rch validation commands.

source_artifacts.evidence: Tracker row for bd-c2qqr and closeout reason.
Strict and hardened deterministic fixtures for the 12 completed string/memory wave-10 symbols.
execute_fixture_case dispatch and deterministic string/memory wave-10 fixture executor.
Harness tests for wave-10 fixture schema, both-mode coverage, structured logs, and isolated execution.
Canonical coverage artifact refreshed by bd-y4aj6 after wave-10 and wave-11 landed.
Per-symbol fixture rows linking every wave-10 symbol to string_memory_hotpaths_wave10.json.
Campaign prioritizer no longer lists completed wave-10 symbols as next first-wave work.
Machine-readable binding for bd-c2qqr completion obligations.
Fail-closed checker for source bindings, coverage accounting, telemetry, and remote-rch validation commands.
Rust harness tests for the wave-10 completion contract and negative drift signatures.

required_validation_commands: RCH_FORCE_REMOTE=true RCH_VISIBILITY=summary rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/rch_target_frankenlibc_browntern_string_wave10_completion_test cargo test -p frankenlibc-harness --test string_memory_hotpaths_wave10_completion_contract_test -- --nocapture

RCH_FORCE_REMOTE=true RCH_VISIBILITY=summary rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/rch_target_frankenlibc_browntern_string_wave10_completion_check cargo check -p frankenlibc-harness --test string_memory_hotpaths_wave10_completion_contract_test

RCH_FORCE_REMOTE=true RCH_VISIBILITY=summary rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/rch_target_frankenlibc_browntern_string_wave10_completion_clippy cargo clippy -p frankenlibc-harness --test string_memory_hotpaths_wave10_completion_contract_test -- -D warnings

RCH_FORCE_REMOTE=true RCH_VISIBILITY=summary rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/rch_target_frankenlibc_browntern_string_wave10_conformance cargo test -p frankenlibc-harness --test string_memory_hotpaths_wave10_conformance_test -- --nocapture
